row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: The ego vehicle appears to be moving forward along a city street, maintaining a lane position.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: A white truck is visible ahead and slightly to the right; its trajectory aligns with the road direction. A black SUV is present on the left side.

semantic.scene_summary: A daytime urban street scene captured from a vehicle perspective. The view includes a multi-lane road, sidewalks, buildings, trees, and traffic infrastructure.
semantic.visibility_notes: All objects are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp details. No occlusions obscure critical elements.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Objects move smoothly consistent with vehicle motion. No sudden jumps or disappearances occur.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles and pedestrians maintain continuous presence across frames without abrupt changes in position or form.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and tree positions remain stable and coherent over time.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle continues forward steadily within its lane.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards are visible. Traffic flow appears orderly with no signs of conflict requiring emergency maneuvers.

semantic.scene_summary: An AI-generated version of the same urban street scene. It preserves the general layout but exhibits visual artifacts and distortions.
key_objects: White delivery truck (center-right) - text and shape altered
semantic.visibility_notes: Key objects are recognizable but suffer from blurring, warping, and loss of fine detail. Some elements appear duplicated or smeared.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion is generally smooth but shows minor flickering and instability in object boundaries. Textures warp slightly during movement.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames, though their shapes and positions exhibit slight drift or deformation compared to reference.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure remains broadly intact but suffers from local warping and inconsistency in alignment, especially near edges and distant objects.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle appears to continue forward, though motion cues are less precise due to generation artifacts.
decision.risk_context: Scene readability is reduced by visual distortions, which may affect downstream decision interpretation. No clear emergency maneuver is visible, but confidence in hazard detection is lower.
